## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened, including any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- **OS:** [e.g. macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Node.js version:** [e.g. 18.18, 20.11]
- **skillsmp-mcp version:** [e.g. 1.0.0]
- **MCP host:** [e.g. Claude Code, Cursor, custom host]
- **Installation method:** [e.g. npm global, npx, local setup]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here, such as relevant configuration files or logs.

## Possible Fix (optional)

If you have an idea of what might be causing the issue or how to fix it, please share.
